content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

February 14, 2006


Daniel J. McHugh, City Attorney
City of Redlands
Office of the City Attorney
P.O. Box 3005
Redlands, CA 92373-1505

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-182

Dear Mr. McHugh:

This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").¹ The Act requires the Commission to provide written advice to any person whose duties under the Act are in question or to that person's authorized representative. (Section 83114(b); regulation 18329(a) - copy enclosed.) However, the Commission may decline to provide written advice where the requestor is seeking advice that requires us to evaluate conduct that has already occurred. (Regulation 18329(b)(8)(A) and (c)(4)(A).)

Formal written advice is the application of law to a given set of facts provided by the requestor and has the purpose of conferring immunity to the requestor. (Section 83114; regulation 18329(b)(7).) After a careful review of the facts giving rise to your question, we decline to provide written advice to you. Your current question concerns an anticipated governmental action that is inextricably involved with a governmental action that has already taken place and in which the advisee, Councilmember Patricia Gilbreath, has already participated. Therefore, issuing advice at this time would relate to past conduct and, therefore, would not further the impartial, effective administration of the Act so mandated by section 83111.



¹ Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109 – 18997, of the California Code of Regulations.

File No. W-05-182
Page No. 2

Please note that our decision is not a determination of the questions posed in your
request. In addition, nothing in the Act prevents an official from seeking legal advice
from you or private counsel.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916)
322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Andreas C. Rockas
Counsel, Legal Division

Enclosure
